registry_refs.notes: Registry rank 214; current row is no_sitemap and has no mapped adapter.

publication_scope.notes: Shared commercial publisher host; every route must remain under the JIEL journal code.

evidence.notes: No rule disallows /jiel journal pages. Sign-in, search, citation download, store, and chapter PDF routes are restricted; the file also names OUP sitemaps.
Returned a Cloudflare managed challenge titled Just a moment with no journal, issue, article, or metadata content. No challenge solving, browser automation, or retry was attempted.

reconnaissance.notes: The robots-permitted seed failed at the first content request, so the bounded state machine stopped before selector or paywall diagnosis.

include: JIEL issue, article, and supplement pages under /jiel
exclude: Search, sign-in, citation-download, and store routes disallowed by robots
Non-JIEL content reached through publisher navigation
scope.notes: Require /jiel path scope and journal identity on every article candidate.

entry_points.notes: Publisher journal landing page, currently Cloudflare-blocked.

nodes.notes: JIEL landing page; challenge response only.
Expected OUP issue page; not observed.
Expected OUP article page; not observed.
Expected PDF delivery; not observed and access status unknown.

edges.locator: Unavailable until an authorized browser session reaches the JIEL landing/archive UI
edges.notes: Do not invent selectors from the Cloudflare challenge DOM.

archive_patterns.notes: Only live route tested; response was a challenge.

pagination.notes: Challenge markup must not be treated as journal pagination.

layout_eras.label: Oxford Academic layout not observed
layout_eras.notes: No selectors are defensible from current evidence.

validation.notes: No article or PDF URL was reached; paywall and file requirements remain unknown.

robots.notes: /jiel is permitted, with publisher-system routes restricted.

barriers.notes: Cloudflare managed challenge returned HTTP 403 on the journal seed.

access.politeness_notes: Robots was checked first. The state machine stopped after one 403 challenge response with no retries or challenge bypass.

verdict.summary: OUP robots permits the JIEL path, but the first journal request returned a Cloudflare managed challenge, preventing archive, selector, metadata, paywall, and file diagnosis.
blockers: No adapter mapping or sitemap exists in the registry.
Paywall and PDF availability could not be assessed.
verdict.next_action: From an authorized browser or allowlisted environment, capture one issue and one article page under /jiel, determine subscription/open-access status, and only then map an OUP-specific adapter.
verdict.recommended_adapter: UnmappedAdapter pending authorized Oxford Academic reconnaissance
verdict.implementation_notes: Do not automate challenge solving or infer selectors from the challenge page.
